title: Bolsius Reed Diffuser - True Joy - Vanilla Delight - Lasts for up to 10 Weeks - Natural Extracts - No Alcohol Formula - Transparent - Recyclable Glass - 80 ml
features: Enjoy a break with Vanilla Delight! This stick diffuser subtly diffuses the relaxing aroma of floral vanilla for up to 10 weeks. Made with great passion for people and planet, with natural extracts and alcohol-free.
Vanilla Delight exudes a warm, floral fragrance that relaxes you and provides comfort. Enjoy the gentle combination of vanilla with hints of ylang ylang and jasmine, on a base of warm amber and musk.

Inspired by fragrances from nature and made with natural extracts. The composition does not contain alcohol. The fresh summer fragrance spreads slowly in the room and provides a consistent fragrance experience for up to 10 weeks.

The True Joy collection is inspired by the full fragrances from nature. Create a gentle and natural atmosphere in any room with a seductive room perfume from Bolsius. You can choose from three wonderful fragrances. In recyclable glass with a gentle gradient from white to transparent and with cork lid. Enjoy moments just for you alone with these unique fragrances in the current look and feel trend.

Since 1870, bolsius has been manufacturing quality products that create a cozy atmosphere. We do this with passion, craftsmanship and love for people and the environment. bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that stimulate the senses. In this way, you can make every moment special. For yourself and for everyone around you.
description: From the manufacturer Bolsius True Joy The True Joy collection is inspired by the full fragrances from nature.
